series_metadata.series_description: Correspondence and other documentation received by the Board after a rule has been adopted; to be used for rule review, mandated by statute to occur every five years.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic version for 5 years and until no longer of administrative value; then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
